personality.backstory: A teenage runaway who's been surviving on her own since fifteen. Doesn't trust adults, doesn't trust systems, doesn't trust anyone who smiles too easily. Small and easy to underestimate, which is exactly how she likes it.
personality.communicationStyle: Terse, observational, rarely volunteers information. When she does speak, it cuts. Watches more than she talks.
personality.hiddenAgenda: Wants to control the food supply so nobody can threaten her again.
